Shaadi Bhagya Scheme.applicationProcess:
• Apply through Karnataka government portal
• Submit application form
• Verification by state officials
Shaadi Bhagya Scheme.documentsRequired:
• Aadhaar Card
• Residence certificate
• Income certificate
• Age proof
• Bank account details

Raitha Siri Scheme.applicationProcess:
• Apply through Karnataka agriculture portal
• Submit application online or at local office
• Verification by state authorities
Raitha Siri Scheme.documentsRequired:
• Aadhaar Card
• Land certificate
• Income certificate
• Bank account details
• Residence proof

PM Kisan Samman Nidhi.applicationProcess:
• Apply through official government portal or nearest CSC center
• Fill application form and submit required documents
• Verification is done by local authorities
PM Kisan Samman Nidhi.documentsRequired:
• Aadhaar Card
• Land ownership documents
• Bank account details
• Income certificate

National Marriage Assistance Scheme.applicationProcess:
• Apply through official government portal
• Submit form and required documents
• Verification done by authorities
National Marriage Assistance Scheme.documentsRequired:
• Aadhaar Card
• Income certificate
• Age proof (Birth certificate)
• Bank account details

Widow Pension Scheme (SSP).documentsRequired:
• Aadhaar Card
• Death Certificate of Husband
• Income Certificate
• Residence Proof
• Bank Account Details

Farmer Widow Pension Scheme.documentsRequired:
• Aadhaar Card
• Death Certificate
• Residence Proof
• Bank Passbook
